channel.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)
channel.description: Recent content in Extra Chapter: Online Learning on Introduction to Machine Learning (I2ML)

item.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning - Introduction
item.description: In this chapter we explain the differences between online and batch learning, the extended learning protocol in online learning and the strategies to measure performance in online learning.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning - Simple Algorithms
item.description: In this chapter we introduce the formalization of online learning algorithms and the Follow the Leader (FTL) algorithm.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning - Follow the Leader on Online Linear Optimization
item.description: In this chapter we introduce Online Linear Optimization (OLO) problems and explain why Follow the Leader (FTL) can fail on these problems.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning - Follow the Regularized Leader
item.description: In this chapter we introduce Follow the Regularized Leader (FTRL) as a stable alternative to Follow the Leader (FTL).

item.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning - Follow the Leader on Online Quadratic Optimization
item.description: In this chapter we prove that Follow the Leader (FTL) works for Online Quadratic Optimization (OQO) problems.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning - Online Convex Optimization 1
item.description: In this chapter we introduce the class of Online Convex Optimization (OCO) problems and derive Online Gradient Descent (OGD) as a suitable learning algorithm for such cases.

item.title: Extra Chapter: Online Learning - Online Convex Optimization 2
item.description: In this chapter we explain the connection between Online Gradient Descent (OGD) and Follow the Regularized Leader (FTRL) via linearization of convex functions and how this implies regret bounds for OGD.
